case_title: CHAVEZ, ENRIQUETA VS BEST, THOMAS G. DBA LAW OFFICES OF THOMAS G. BEST

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY CHAVEZ, ENRIQUETA AS TO DEFENDANT BEST, THOMAS G. DBA LAW OFFICES OF THOMAS G. BEST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-26-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-26-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-16-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 THE COURT DIDN'T RECEIVE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFT. CASE CONTD. TO ALLOW PLTF. TO SERVE DEFT. COURTS EARLIER OFFER OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT, VACATED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAVEZ, ENRIQUETA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BEST, THOMAS G. DBA LAW OFFICES OF THOMAS G. BEST STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
